query: /wiki-project-clarify — the morning roll-up said the thesis project has 3 clarifications open.
expected_behavior: Gathers pending clarifications via python3 tools/wiki.py project agenda clarifications --json, filtered to the thesis slug
Interviews the operator ONE task at a time, not by dumping all 3 tasks' questions in a single wall of text
Batches a single task's own questions together rather than asking them one at a time across multiple turns
Uses AskUserQuestion when a task's open questions have a small set of concrete options, and plain text otherwise
